assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: The response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the BFCM period and notes the 30-day maximum limitation

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: The response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the June code freeze period

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: The response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support for permanent control, which auto-tracks the End of Support date

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions the 30-day maximum for 'no_upgrades' exclusions and explains that the persistent policy automatically tracks EoS dates

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: The response provides complete gcloud commands with the correct --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for all three scenarios

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48h maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: While the response mentions using exclusions 'sparingly' for no_upgrades, it does not explicitly warn about the risk of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
